title: Better End City Loot
description: Vanilla friendly improvements to the variety of loot found in end city chests.
body:
This datapack alters the vanilla loot table for end city chests. Several items have been replaced, improving the quality of loot and bringing it more up to date with modern Minecraft. The changes are very minimal and not overpowered at all.

For example, beetroot seeds were removed as this is quite an outdated addition. Instead you can find firework rockets, allowing you to fly around the end once you get an elytra. Some other useful additions like lapis lazuli, amethyst shards and a rare netherite ingot were also included.
